gates.title: Deep Sleep folds parallel Codex sub-agents into parent work threads
evidence_required: src/transcript_utils.py preserves first session_meta as the Codex thread identity and exposes parent_thread_id, agent_nickname, agent_role, and source fields
src/scripts/deep-sleep/collect.py folds spawned sub-agent transcripts into their parent session before counting and analysis
tests/test_deep_sleep_collect.py verifies sub-agent folding and transcript metadata handling

gates.title: Local Context prevents entity_facts cartesian growth during fact replacement
evidence_required: src/local_context/api.py attributes chunk facts only to entities mentioned in that chunk
src/local_context/api.py caps facts per asset with NEXO_ENTITY_FACTS_MAX_PER_ASSET and skips paragraph-length values with NEXO_ENTITY_FACT_MAX_VALUE_LEN
py_compile and focused Local Context tests pass without requiring a schema migration

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.8
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page, and sitemap reference v7.30.8
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill, and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.8
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.8 contract before tag publish
